string.text:
The AVT-40 is a full-auto variant of the SVT-40, it was made to compensate the Red Army's shortage of machineguns. Although not exactly a success, it still did the job somewhat, as long as it is shot in burst of 3 or 4 and not full-auto, the recoil is somewhat controllable. To differ it from the other SVTs, the AVT-40 has an "A" letter stamped on the stock, as well as the Tula Arms emblem.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
%c[d_purple]• %c[ui_gray_2] PU special scope
